summary: The documentation-only change accurately records the implemented SOLID_SERVER_SEED_DEMO behavior and clearly distinguishes it from the proposed public-demo contract. The cited implementation uses an in-memory-seed guard, creates a public-readable pod and anonymous read/write playground, denies anonymous Control, and remains opt-in; the focused demo seed test exercises those authorization properties on the real WAC authorizer path. Updating bead B from greenfield implementation to alignment work is consistent with that verified divergence. No correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security issue was found in the diff.
